grant_sections.name: general_audience_abstract
grant_sections.title: General Audience Abstract
grant_sections.instructions: Provide a non-technical summary of the proposed research project suitable for a general audience. Clearly and concisely describe the project's goals, methods, and expected impact, avoiding jargon.

grant_sections.name: technical_abstract
grant_sections.title: Technical Abstract
grant_sections.instructions: Provide a concise technical summary of the proposed research project, including the specific aims, research design, and expected outcomes. Use appropriate scientific terminology. Clearly articulate the translational potential of the project.

grant_sections.name: keywords
grant_sections.title: Keywords
grant_sections.instructions: Provide a list of keywords that accurately describe the proposed research. Include specific terms related to melanoma, research methodology, and key concepts relevant to your project. Separate keywords by commas.

grant_sections.name: background_and_specific_aims
grant_sections.title: Background and Specific Aims
grant_sections.instructions: Provide a comprehensive background of the research topic, including relevant gaps in the field. Clearly state the specific aims of the proposed project, ensuring they are measurable and achievable within the project's timeframe. Articulate the project's scientific rationale and how it addresses a critical need in melanoma research.

grant_sections.name: preliminary_data
grant_sections.title: Preliminary Data
grant_sections.instructions: Present relevant preliminary data that supports the feasibility of the proposed research. Clearly describe the methodologies used to generate the data, and highlight key findings that justify the research plan. Emphasize the strengths of the preliminary data, and how it sets the foundation for the proposed research.

grant_sections.name: experimental_design_and_methods
grant_sections.title: Experimental Design and Methods
grant_sections.instructions: Describe in detail the experimental design and methods that will be used to achieve the project's specific aims. Ensure to provide enough detail to ensure reproducibility and validity.  Include specifics on study design, data collection methods, and controls.

grant_sections.name: statistical_plan
grant_sections.title: Statistical Plan
grant_sections.instructions: Outline the statistical methods that will be used to analyze the collected data. Include sample size calculations, statistical tests, and rationale for chosen methodologies. Address how the data will be analyzed and interpreted, ensuring rigor and reproducibility.

grant_sections.name: rationale_and_fit
grant_sections.title: Rationale/Fit with Key Criteria
grant_sections.instructions: Explain how the proposed project addresses key criteria and aligns with MRA's priorities for melanoma research, especially related to prevention, detection, diagnosis, or treatment. Justify the translational impact and rationale. Describe how the research fits into the MRA research portfolio. Address the potential for clinical impact and innovation.

grant_sections.name: clinical_protocol_synopsis
grant_sections.title: Clinical Protocol Synopsis
grant_sections.instructions: Provide a brief protocol synopsis for the proposed clinical study including a timeline with milestones. Include details on IRB approval plans and patient accrual timeline.  This section is only required if a clinical study is proposed.

grant_sections.name: mra_portfolio_fit
grant_sections.title: MRA Portfolio Fit
grant_sections.instructions: Provide a brief statement (up to 2000 characters) of how the proposed research project fits within MRA's overall research portfolio, highlighting alignment with MRA's goals and priorities.

name: MRA Grant Application
